---
title: "Assignment 11"
author: "Leon Lin"
date: "2026-04-16"
output: html_document
---


```{r}
set.seed(4)


items <- c("The Matrix", "Inception", "Interstellar",
           "Parasite", "Everything Everywhere", "WALL-E")
users <- paste0("User", 1:10)

raw_ratings <- matrix(c(
  5, 3, 4, NA,  2,  1,
  4, NA, 5,  3, NA,  2,
 NA,  5, 4,  4,  5,  3,
  2,  4,NA,  5,  3, NA,
  5,  4, 3, NA,  4,  5,
 NA,  3, 2,  4, NA,  5,
  4,  5,NA,  3,  5,  4,
  3, NA, 5,  4,  2, NA,
  2,  4, 3, NA,  5,  4,
  5,  3, 4,  5, NA,  2
), nrow = 10, byrow = TRUE,
   dimnames = list(users, items))

raw_ratings
```

 Train data
 
```{r}
set.seed(7)

known_idx <- which(!is.na(raw_ratings), arr.ind = TRUE)
test_rows <- sample(nrow(known_idx), size = floor(0.20 * nrow(known_idx)))
test_idx  <- known_idx[test_rows, ]

train_mat <- raw_ratings
for (i in seq_len(nrow(test_idx))) {
  train_mat[test_idx[i, 1], test_idx[i, 2]] <- NA
}

cat("Known ratings in full matrix :", sum(!is.na(raw_ratings)), "\n")
cat("Ratings in training set       :", sum(!is.na(train_mat)),  "\n")
cat("Ratings held out for testing  :", nrow(test_idx),           "\n")
```

---



```{r}
user_means <- rowMeans(train_mat, na.rm = TRUE)

centered <- train_mat
for (u in seq_len(nrow(train_mat))) {
  centered[u, ] <- train_mat[u, ] - user_means[u]
}

cat("User means (training):\n")
round(user_means, 2)
```


```{r}
cosine_sim <- function(a, b) {
  common <- !is.na(a) & !is.na(b)
  if (sum(common) < 2) return(NA_real_)       
  num   <- sum(a[common] * b[common])
  denom <- sqrt(sum(a[common]^2)) * sqrt(sum(b[common]^2))
  if (denom == 0) return(0)
  num / denom
}

n_users <- nrow(centered)
sim_mat <- matrix(NA_real_, n_users, n_users,
                  dimnames = list(users, users))

for (i in 1:(n_users - 1)) {
  for (j in (i + 1):n_users) {
    s <- cosine_sim(centered[i, ], centered[j, ])
    sim_mat[i, j] <- s
    sim_mat[j, i] <- s
  }
}
diag(sim_mat) <- 0 

round(sim_mat, 3)
```



```{r}
predict_rating <- function(user, item, sim_mat, train_mat,
                           user_means, K = 3) {
  u_idx <- which(rownames(train_mat) == user)
  i_idx <- which(colnames(train_mat) == item)

  sims       <- sim_mat[u_idx, ]
  rated_item <- !is.na(train_mat[, i_idx])
  rated_item[u_idx] <- FALSE          

  eligible           <- sims * rated_item
  eligible[is.na(eligible)] <- 0

  
  if (sum(eligible > 0) == 0) return(user_means[u_idx])

  top_k <- order(eligible, decreasing = TRUE)[1:min(K, sum(eligible > 0))]
  top_k <- top_k[eligible[top_k] > 0]

  wts  <- sims[top_k]
  devs <- train_mat[top_k, i_idx] - user_means[top_k]

  pred <- user_means[u_idx] + sum(wts * devs) / sum(abs(wts))
  max(1, min(5, pred))   
}
```


```{r}
top_n_recs <- function(user, n = 3, train_mat, sim_mat,
                       user_means, K = 3) {
  u_idx   <- which(rownames(train_mat) == user)
  unrated <- which(is.na(train_mat[u_idx, ]))
  if (length(unrated) == 0) return(data.frame())

  preds <- sapply(names(unrated), function(item) {
    predict_rating(user, item, sim_mat, train_mat, user_means, K)
  })

  df <- data.frame(
    User             = user,
    Item             = names(preds),
    Predicted_Rating = round(preds, 2),
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
  df[order(-df$Predicted_Rating)[1:min(n, nrow(df))], ]
}

rec_list <- lapply(users, function(u)
  top_n_recs(u, n = 3, train_mat, sim_mat, user_means, K = 3))

recs_df <- do.call(rbind, rec_list)
rownames(recs_df) <- NULL

recs_df
```




```{r}
u        <- "User1"
item     <- "Parasite"
u_idx    <- which(rownames(train_mat) == u)
i_idx    <- which(colnames(train_mat) == item)

sims       <- sim_mat[u_idx, ]
rated_mask <- !is.na(train_mat[, i_idx])
rated_mask[u_idx] <- FALSE

eligible <- sort(sims[rated_mask & !is.na(sims)], decreasing = TRUE)

cat("User1's mean ratingg", round(user_means["User1"], 2), "\n\n")
cat("Neighbours who rated 'Parasite' and their similarities")
for (nb in names(eligible)) {
  cat(sprintf("  %-8s  sim=%.3f  raw rating=%.0f  deviation=%.2f\n",
              nb,
              sims[nb],
              train_mat[nb, item],
              train_mat[nb, item] - user_means[nb]))
}
cat("\nPredicted rating for User1 → Parasite:",
    round(predict_rating("User1", "Parasite",
                         sim_mat, train_mat, user_means, K = 3), 2))
```

Evaluate the model

```{r}
preds_test <- numeric(nrow(test_idx))
actuals    <- numeric(nrow(test_idx))

for (i in seq_len(nrow(test_idx))) {
  u    <- rownames(raw_ratings)[test_idx[i, 1]]
  item <- colnames(raw_ratings)[test_idx[i, 2]]
  preds_test[i] <- predict_rating(u, item, sim_mat, train_mat, user_means, K = 3)
  actuals[i]    <- raw_ratings[test_idx[i, 1], test_idx[i, 2]]
}

rmse_cf  <- sqrt(mean((preds_test - actuals)^2))
mae_cf   <- mean(abs(preds_test - actuals))

g_mean       <- mean(train_mat, na.rm = TRUE)
rmse_base    <- sqrt(mean((g_mean - actuals)^2))
mae_base     <- mean(abs(g_mean - actuals))

results <- data.frame(
  Model          = c("Global Mean Baseline", "User-User CF (K=3)"),
  RMSE           = round(c(rmse_base, rmse_cf), 4),
  MAE            = round(c(mae_base,  mae_cf),  4)
)
results
```

```{r}
test_eval <- data.frame(
  Index   = seq_along(actuals),
  Actual  = actuals,
  CF_Pred = round(preds_test, 2),
  BL_Pred = round(g_mean, 2)
)

cat("Test-set comparison (Actual vs. CF Prediction vs. Baseline):\n")
test_eval
```

```{r}

barplot(
  results$RMSE,
  names.arg = results$Model,
  col       = c("#d9534f", "#5bc0de"),
  ylim      = c(0, max(results$RMSE) * 1.35),
  ylab      = "RMSE",
  main      = "RMSE: Global Mean Baseline vs. User-User CF",
  border    = NA
)
abline(h = 0)
text(x   = c(0.7, 1.9),
     y   = results$RMSE + 0.04,
     labels = results$RMSE,
     cex    = 0.9, font = 2)
```

---
